paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the setup of an Interim Office of the CEO, as well as the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have turned bullish on the stock despite a sharp selloff, with some citing it as a long-term money play.

Fermi Inc has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing, but no Form 144 filings.
